⏺ How should I handle the conflict in package.json?

  1. Keep both versions and let npm dedupe
  2. Use only the newer version (^4.2.0)
  3. Use only the older version (^3.8.1)

╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ ❯                                                                        │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
